title: IngestionPackage
description: The atomic unit of the ingestion pipeline. A single submission that contains: the raw input, classification results, a primary document action (create or update), all downstream impacted document changes, and a single approval package that covers everything atomically. Nothing in this package is applied to the operational document collections until the entire package is approved. Stored in Firestore at /ingestionPackages/{packageId}.

x-firestore.note: Packages are not versioned themselves — they are a transaction record. Once Applied or Rejected, they are immutable. A re-submission creates a new package.

packageId.description: Unique ID for this ingestion package. Maps to the Firestore document ID.

status.description: Lifecycle state of this package. Transitions are one-directional — packages never move backwards.

statusDetail.description: Human-readable detail on current status (e.g. 'Awaiting manufacturer model number before staging can complete', 'Applied to 4 documents at 2026-06-22T14:30:00Z').

createdAt.description: When this package was created (submission timestamp).

updatedAt.description: Last time any field in this package was modified.

submittedBy.description: The person who submitted the ingestion request.

input.description: The raw input submitted by the user. Omnimodal — one or more input items.

userIntent.description: The free-text instruction the user provided alongside the input (e.g. 'We are adding this computer to our lab, we need the documentation').

items.description: One or more input artifacts submitted together.

storageRef.description: Firebase Storage path to the raw uploaded file.

url.description: If inputType is URL, the target URL.

rawText.description: If inputType is PlainText, the text content.

classification.description: Output of the Classification Agent. Identifies what the input is, what action is being requested, and what document types are implicated.

identifiedSubject.description: What the Classification Agent determined the input to be (e.g. 'Dell PowerEdge R750 Server', 'Chemical drum - Hydrochloric Acid 37%', 'Evacuation floor plan - Building C').

subjectCategory.description: High-level category of the identified subject.

primaryDocType.description: The primary document type this ingestion will create or update.

impliedDocTypes.description: Additional document types that will likely need creation or updates as a result of this ingestion.

confidence.description: Classification confidence score (0.0–1.0). If below threshold (0.75), package enters NeedsInput state.

confidenceFlags.description: Specific fields or decisions where the Classification Agent had low confidence.

subagentLog.description: Log of every subagent that ran as part of this ingestion, their status, and what they found or produced.

findingsSummary.description: Human-readable summary of what this agent found or produced.

sourcesConsulted.description: URLs, document IDs, or other sources this agent consulted.

errorMessage.description: If status is Failed, the error message.

researchFindings.description: Structured output from the Research Agent. Contains gathered facts about the identified subject that will feed the Schema Mapper.

gapReport.description: Output of the Gap Agent. Lists every required schema field that could not be auto-filled, with context on why and a suggested resolution. These become the checklist a reviewer must complete before approval.

field.description: The schema field path that is missing (e.g. 'steps[2].instructions', 'safetyRequirements[0].standard').

docTarget.description: Which document in the package this gap belongs to ('primary' or an impactedDocId).

suggestion.description: The Gap Agent's best suggestion or question to ask the reviewer.

resolvedValue.description: Populated by the reviewer when they fill this gap during review.

resolvedBy.description: userId of the person who resolved this gap.

primaryAction.description: The primary document create or update action this package will apply when approved.

targetCollection.description: Firestore collection the document will be created in or updated (e.g. 'sops', 'mops', 'eops').

existingDocId.description: If actionType is Update or Retire, the Firestore document ID of the existing document.

proposedVersion.description: The version string that will be set on the document if this package is approved.

documentDraft.description: The full proposed document conforming to the appropriate schema (sop.schema.json, mop.schema.json, or eop.schema.json). This is what gets written to Firestore on approval.

changeSummary.description: Human-readable description of what this primary action does.

autoFilledFields.description: List of field paths that were auto-filled by subagents (for reviewer transparency).

impactedDocuments.description: All existing documents that the Dependency Agent identified as needing updates because of this ingestion. These proposed changes are included in the same approval package as the primary action — one approval covers everything.

impactId.description: Unique ID for this impact item within the package.

existingDocId.description: Firestore document ID of the existing document.

existingDocName.description: Display name of the existing document for review UI.

collection.description: Collection the existing document lives in.

changeType.description: What kind of change is being proposed to this document.

rationale.description: Why the Dependency Agent flagged this document as needing this change.

proposedChanges.description: Field-level proposed changes. Each entry is one field path and its proposed new value.

fieldPath.description: Dot-notation path to the field being changed (e.g. 'relatedDocuments', 'equipment[0]').

currentValue.description: The current value of this field (populated from Firestore for reviewer comparison).

reviewerDecision.description: Reviewer's decision on this specific impact item — can accept or reject individual items without rejecting the whole package.

approvalPackage.description: The single approval that covers the primary action AND all accepted impacted document changes. One decision, one chain of custody entry, applied atomically.

assignedReviewers.description: Users assigned to review this package.

required.description: If true, this reviewer must act before the package can be approved.

reviewActions.description: Ordered log of every review action taken on this package.

gapsResolved.description: IDs of gap report items resolved during this review action.

impactItemDecisions.description: Per-item decisions on impacted documents made during this review action.

finalDecision.description: The final decision on this package.

applicationLog.description: Record of what actually happened when this approved package was applied to Firestore. Populated after status transitions to Applied.

appliedBy.description: System or userId that triggered the application.

documentsWritten.description: Firestore paths that were written or updated.

versionRecordsCreated.description: Firestore paths of version history records created in subcollections.

errors.description: Any errors encountered during application. If non-empty, status should be Failed.
